finding: TCP connectivity completed, but TLS negotiation did not complete successfully
likely_cause: TLS inspection, proxying, firewall inspection, or another network-path device interfering with the connection
action_taken: Collected packet capture and isolated issue beyond basic endpoint firewall and routing checks
next_steps: Provide packet capture to network or security team
Review TLS inspection or proxy policies along the path
Confirm whether the management server and port are excluded from TLS inspection
Retest agent registration after network-path changes
Collect a new packet capture if the issue persists
